title: Sweet and Sour Cocktail Meatballs

sections.name: Meatballs
ingredients: ¾ Cup Plain Dry Bread Crumbs
½ Cup Grey Poupon Dijon Mustard, divided
½ Cup Chopped Green Onions, divided

sections.name: Sauce
ingredients: ⅓ Cup Firmly Packed Light Brown Sugar
¼ Cup Diced Red Bell Pepper

instructions:
Combine turkey, bread crumbs, ¼ cup mustard, ¼ cup green onions, egg, ginger and black pepper in large bowl. Shape into 32 (1-inch) balls. Place in greased 13×9×2-inch baking dish. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.

Combine pineapple chunks with juice, sugar, vinegar, red bell pepper, cornstarch and remaining mustard and green onions in medium saucepan. Cook over medium heat until sauce thickens and begins to boil.

Spoon pineapple sauce over meatballs. Bake 5 to 7 minutes more or until meatballs are done. Spoon into serving dish and serve with toothpicks.
